product_overview: Ramadhan VibeTracker is a Next.js + Firebase web app to help students track spiritual activities, donate via Mayar, and request elevated roles (teacher/staff) with admin approval and real-time audit logging. It focuses on live interactions, accessibility, and secure payment/webhook handling.
core_goals: Enable students to track and improve daily spiritual activities with dynamic progress weighting and micro-interactions.
Provide a role request workflow allowing students to request teacher/staff roles and admins to approve/reject via an auditable API.
Integrate Mayar payment gateway to process Sadaqah donations with checkout and webhook-based confirmation.
Expose a real-time, terminal-style admin audit log for visibility into system events and actions.
Maintain accessibility (WCAG 2.1) and secure authentication using Firebase.

features.name: Role Request System
features.description: Students can submit requests to become teacher/staff; admins review and approve or reject requests via the admin command center. Requests are created and updated via /api/admin/role-request.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/student -> Click Request Role button -> Fill role form: select role and enter justification -> Click Submit -> POST /api/admin/role-request -> See confirmation message 'Request submitted' -> Receive in-app notification of submission

Navigate to /dashboard/student -> Click Request Role button -> Leave justification empty -> Click Submit -> See inline validation error 'Justification required' -> Fill justification -> Click Submit -> POST /api/admin/role-request -> See confirmation message

Navigate to /dashboard/admin -> Open Role Requests panel -> Click a pending request -> Review request details -> Click Approve -> PATCH /api/admin/role-request -> See request status update to 'Approved' -> User receives role update notification

Navigate to /dashboard/admin -> Open Role Requests panel -> Click a pending request -> Click Approve -> PATCH /api/admin/role-request -> Receive network/server error -> See error toast 'Unable to update request' -> Retry PATCH /api/admin/role-request

features.name: Sadaqah Mayar Integration
features.description: Student-facing Sadaqah hub that initiates Mayar checkout, handles payment redirects, and processes webhook confirmations to update donation status in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/student/sadaqah -> Select donation amount -> Click Donate -> POST /api/checkout/mayar -> Redirect to Mayar payment page -> Complete payment on Mayar -> Webhook POST /api/webhook/mayar delivered -> See donation success confirmation and updated donation history

Navigate to /dashboard/student/sadaqah -> Select donation amount -> Click Donate -> POST /api/checkout/mayar -> Redirect to Mayar payment page -> Payment declined by user/bank -> Webhook POST /api/webhook/mayar indicates failure -> See payment failed message and option to retry

Navigate to /dashboard/student/sadaqah -> Select donation amount -> Click Donate -> POST /api/checkout/mayar -> Complete payment on Mayar -> Webhook delivery fails -> See donation listed as 'Pending confirmation' with notice 'Awaiting webhook' -> System retries webhook and updates on delivery

features.name: Admin Audit Log
features.description: A real-time terminal-style audit stream in the Super Admin Command Center that shows system activities, role request changes, payment events, and other critical logs for monitoring and troubleshooting.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/admin -> See real-time terminal-style audit stream initialize -> Observe new log entries appear live -> Click filter control -> Set filter to 'info' -> See filtered entries update in stream -> Click a log entry -> See expanded details (timestamp, actor, payload)
Navigate to /dashboard/admin without authentication -> See redirect to / or access denied message 'Authentication required' -> Prompt to sign in via Firebase

Navigate to /dashboard/admin -> See real-time terminal-style audit stream initialize -> Real-time connection drops -> See 'Connection lost' indicator -> Click Retry -> Stream reconnects and recent logs synchronize
